MINI MINUTES: Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Swords to Plowshares is present. Represented by Jerome Bradley.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Gooll Breazzee is present. Defendant arrived at 2:30pm.
Attorney Marshall Bentley appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Jun-27-2018 is vacated. (501)
